payload.label: fireplace
payload.long_description: Partial crop showing a dark charcoal-painted wooden fireplace mantel with stepped molding visible along the top and left edges; the firebox interior is a deep black void and a mottled gray-brown stone or hearth log is visible at the lower edge — object is cut off by the image border and appears photographed at close range (~0.8 m).
